scripts.build: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge build; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping (install via foundryup)'; fi
scripts.clean: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge clean; else rm -rf out cache .turbo; fi
scripts.test: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge test; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping'; fi
